title: Loving peace and loving not strife are not the same thing
body:
- I want to provide a more robust definition for peace peacefulness and peacemaker 
- peace shalom in the scriptures seems to entail steady exchange between parties, exchange marked by mutuality 
- unilateral decision makers unilateral movers who do not mutually share the wheel of their decision-making with others cannot achieve peace with others. At best they can achieve not strife.
excerpt: - I want to provide a more robust definition for peace peacefulness and peacemaker
